name: Improper Handling of File Names that Identify Virtual Resources
description: The product does not properly handle filenames that identify virtual resources rather than actual files, such as device names or special filesystem entries, leading to unintended operations on non-file entities.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a filename that maps to a virtual resource (device, pipe, special filesystem entry) rather than a regular file, which flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that validates the filename refers to an actual file and not a virtual resource
